AI: 😊 Hello Darshan, Java is a widely-used programming language that follows the Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) paradigm. It allows developers to create modular programs using packages and can be extended with user-defined classes. Moreover, it's known for its portability across platforms through the use of bytecode and virtual machine interpretation or just-in-time compilation like in Java HotSpot VM. Would you need assistance on how to start learning Java?
